mapper.select:
select f.flower_id, f.deceased_id, f.visitor_name, f.flower_type, f.message, f.ip_address, f.create_time, d.name as deceased_name from mem_flower f left join mem_deceased d on f.deceased_id = d.deceased_id
and f.deceased_id = #{deceasedId}
and f.visitor_name like concat('%', #{visitorName}, '%')
order by f.create_time desc

select f.flower_id, f.deceased_id, f.visitor_name, f.flower_type, f.message, f.ip_address, f.create_time, d.name as deceased_name from mem_flower f left join mem_deceased d on f.deceased_id = d.deceased_id where f.flower_id = #{flowerId}

select f.flower_id, f.deceased_id, f.visitor_name, f.flower_type, f.message, f.ip_address, f.create_time, d.name as deceased_name from mem_flower f left join mem_deceased d on f.deceased_id = d.deceased_id where f.deceased_id = #{deceasedId} order by f.create_time desc
select count(*) from mem_flower where deceased_id = #{deceasedId}
mapper.insert: insert into mem_flower (deceased_id, visitor_name, flower_type, message, ip_address, create_time) values (#{deceasedId}, #{visitorName}, #{flowerType}, #{message}, #{ipAddress}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from mem_flower where flower_id in
#{flowerId}
